name: Family Tree!
author: Poki
description: Family Tree! is a brain-boosting logic puzzle game that takes you on a journey through generations! Use clues to unlock intricate family branches, solve word puzzles, and uncover the hidden stories of ancestors. As you piece together the past, you’ll build thriving towns and reveal long-lost secrets. Train your focus, sharpen your memory, and enjoy a captivating adventure for the whole family! How to play Family Tree!? Click and hold to move items. Who created Family Tree!? Family Tree! is created by Lion Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Mr Bullet , Love Balls and Happy Glass ! How can I play Family Tree! for free? You can play Family Tree! for free on Poki. Can I play Family Tree! on mobile devices and desktop? Family Tree! can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
